title: Britannica.com
body: Britannica.com is the domain name of the main website of Encyclopædia Britannica, which provides partial free access to the paid online edition of the encyclopaedia, titled Encyclopaedia Britannica. The paid edition is known as Britannica Academic, previously Britannica Online. It is published by Encyclopædia Britannica, Inc., which is based in Chicago, Illinois.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English
